tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting prediabetes or impaired glucose tolerance, despite normal fasting glucose. There is mild hyperchloremia and low total CO₂, which may indicate a mild non-anion gap metabolic acidosis. All other hematological and biochemical parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for metabolic status and follow-up of glycemic control.
